meaning: n.中间形态,[昆]龄(幼虫两次蜕皮之间的虫期),其时期的节足动物
examples: Near the end of each instar, the larva undergoes a process called apolysis.
With 8th instar nymphs, the critical period for regeneration was from 20 to 26 days-old.
Fasting experiments with the fifth instar larva indicate that free lipidscould be utilized as an energy source.
